content:
This is a spoiler-free list of 8 side stories I recommend to those interested in the lore of Morimens to read and in what order.

Of course, you don’t have to follow my suggestion, and feedback from more experienced players are always welcome!
https://docs.google.com/document/d/1K72xeUFXunaR8WqwEN1YyEPVyd09q71KJHoBKROhoho/edit?usp=sharing

note: this is **Not** a meta based recommendation. this list is based on what is most relevant to the main story. 
the posses from these side stories range from decent to "even i dont use them"

embeds.title: Niko's Event Unlock Recommendations
embeds.description: Since the in-game side story list is not in chronological order, this is a spoiler-free list of side stories I recommend to those interested in the lore of Morimens to read and in what order.  This list is also a spoiler-free companion list to my (spoiler full) Morimens timeline project, where I ...
